commands.review_summary:
The PR parses plain JSON-RPC `send` reply-target aliases, forwards them as `selectedMessageGuid` to the bridge send path, blocks AppleScript fallback for reply-target sends, and adds focused RPC bridge tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main never reads `reply_to` on plain RPC `send` and never forwards `selectedMessageGuid` to the bridge. I did not run a live successful Messages bridge reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor or Mantis positive bridge proof plus maintainer acceptance of the fail-closed compatibility behavior, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: fix: thread rpc send replies
target.body:
Closes #144.

Plain RPC `send` now forwards reply target aliases into the bridge `selectedMessageGuid` payload, matching `send.rich` behavior.

Reply-target sends now fail instead of falling back to unthreaded AppleScript delivery when the bridge is unavailable or fails.

Proof note: on a macOS arm64 branch-built `imsg` with SIP enabled and no bridge helper (`bridge_version: 0`), RPC `send` with `reply_to` returns `Invalid params: reply_to requires bridge transport; AppleScript fallback cannot send threaded replies`, so the no-bridge path fails before AppleScript delivery. Positive threaded-send proof has been requested from Mantis because this local machine cannot inject the bridge.

Verified with focused RPC bridge coverage plus the full test and lint gates.

(sha=c9e7cf1f1a4ae37c03b2cf5b7c920dd811cfe780)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/cli.ts` so the forced-exit path waits for an empty stdout write callback before calling `process.exit`, with a 2s safety timeout.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue gives a concrete greater-than-64KB pipe repro, and current main still emits large JSON through stdout before a timed hard exit with no drain handling; I did not execute the repro in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human PR review because the external branch is plausible but lacks required real behavior proof and has a bounded-exit timing tradeoff maintainers should verify before merge.

target.title: fix: flush stdout before forced exit to avoid 64KB pipe truncation
target.author: badmoo
